description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoon canine, with a predominantly purple body and beige accents on the face, paws, and belly. The toy features a large, rounded head with tall, pointed ears and expressive, wide-set eyes. Its snout is short and rounded, with a small, subtle nose and a simple stitched mouth, giving it a gentle and approachable appearance. The arms and legs are short and stubby, extending outward from the body, while a small tail protrudes from the back. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of fabric plush toys, and the overall build is slightly chubby and huggable. There are no visible clothing items, accessories, or brand markings on the toy.
description: A soft, plush cartoon dog stuffed toy with a purple body, beige face, and simple, friendly features. It has large ears, stubby limbs, and a small tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's face, large ears, wide-set eyes, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, snout, and the protruding tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and tail, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, snout, and tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a small, simple mouth. The eyebrows are slightly arched, giving a gentle and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms extended outward and legs slightly apart, head facing forward.
